description_long: This lantern features a tall, cylindrical body with a smooth, frosted white surface that diffuses light softly. The lower portion of the lantern is darker, creating a gradient effect that enhances its visual appeal. Decorative black motifs, including a large stylized 'G' surrounded by vine and leaf patterns, adorn the front, while the text 'DVŮR POD STARÝMA HORAMA' wraps around the base. The code 'MP 123' is printed vertically on one side, suggesting a model or identification number. The lantern appears to be made primarily of glass or acrylic, with possible metal or plastic components at the base. Its design is both functional and decorative, suitable for urban outdoor or indoor settings.
description: A tall, cylindrical lantern with a frosted white body, black decorative motifs, and text around the base. The design features a gradient from white to dark at the bottom and includes a prominent stylized 'G' with vine patterns.
description_view_0: This view shows the lantern's smooth frosted surface with the vertical 'MP 123' marking and a subtle gradient to a darker base.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the decorative vine motif and the start of the text 'DVŮR POD ST', with the frosted white body clearly visible.
description_view_2: The front view displays the large stylized 'G' surrounded by vine and leaf patterns, along with the full text 'DVŮR POD STARÝMA HORAMA' at the base.
description_view_3: This side shows the continuation and end of the base text, with the frosted white surface and dark lower section prominent.
